steps.title: Focus on location
steps.content: The question asks for the location of the figures in The Space in Which We Travel. The notes say the painting shows two young girls floating in the center of the canvas.

steps.title: Remove irrelevant features
steps.content: Choice A discusses the painting's size. Choice B describes mood and number of figures. Choice D describes the colors used for water. The remaining choice identifies the figures and says they are in the center of the canvas. The answer is C.
